title: Vince Fawcett
extract: Vince Fawcett (13 November 1970 – 6 February 2026) was an English professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1980s and 1990s. He played at club level for Leeds, Workington Town, the Parramatta Eels, Oldham Bears, the Warrington Wolves and the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats, as a wing, stand-off, or loose forward.
